locations.name: St. Paul's Cathedral, London
locations.semantic_criteria: A grey, untextured 3D mesh rendering of London set against a bright green screen background, prominently featuring St. Paul's Cathedral in the center with its detailed dome and twin towers. The surrounding urban context is depicted as extruded low-poly block geometry with visible wireframe edges, including the Shard in the far left background, captured from a wide-angle aerial perspective.
